223 G0110C1_WLK_ROOM_SELF_CD G0110C1_WLK_ROOM_SELF_CD G0110C1 ADL Assistance: Walk In Room Self Performance Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the resident's self-performance ability to walk in their room. -=Not assessed/no information
